goal: see, edit, and append to my watched list
benefit: so that I can effectively track my movie watching history
acceptance_criteria: One can only edit their own watched list
Movies can be added to the watched list
Movies already on the watched list cannot be added
The user can search with key words for movies
The user can select genres from the UI to browse movies and then add them

goal: see, invite, and remove users from my Friends list
benefit: so that I can manage my social network and connect with other users
acceptance_criteria: One can only edit their own Friends list
Other users can be invited to the Friends list
Other users already on the Friends list cannot be invited
Only usernames of registered users can be invited as friends
Invited friends receive a request in the application, acceptance of which makes them mutual friends
